differential_diagnoses: Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF)
next_steps: Complete blood count and iron studies to evaluate for anemia
Repeat transthoracic echocardiography to reassess aortic valve severity and diastolic function
Fecal immunochemical test or colonoscopy to screen for occult GI bleeding
Cardiac catheterization or coronary CT angiography to assess for obstructive CAD
Referral for Heart Team evaluation for potential TAVR
Pulmonary function testing to evaluate for restrictive lung disease

differential_diagnoses: Anemia (iron deficiency secondary to chronic aspirin use)
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF)
Chronic obstructive or restrictive lung disease (post-GPA scarring)
next_steps: Laboratory evaluation: CBC, iron studies, TSH, NT-proBNP, and troponin
Repeat transthoracic echocardiography to reassess aortic valve gradient and diastolic function
Fecal immunochemical test for occult GI bleeding
Pulmonary function testing (spirometry and lung volumes)
Cardiac evaluation for ischemia (e.g., coronary CT angiography)
Referral for Heart Team evaluation regarding TAVR
